sql_blocks.label: Block 1
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT
        vid.PalletNumber,
        vid.WarehouseLocationId,
        vid.ProductId,
        vid.ProductionDate,
        vid.ShelfLifeDate,
        vid.Weight,
        vid.Qty,

        -- Order constraints
        ol.ItemMinProductionDate,
        ol.ItemMaxProductionDate,
        ol.ItemMinWeight,
        ol.ItemMaxWeight,
        ol.ItemMinSellByDate,

        -- Existing task / commitment checks
        dtExisting.DirectedTaskId AS ExistingTaskId,
        invCommitted.DeliveryNumber AS CommittedDelivery,

        ------------------------------------------------------------------
        -- RULE FLAGS (1 = FAIL, 0 = PASS)
        ------------------------------------------------------------------
        CASE 
            WHEN ol.ItemMinProductionDate IS NOT NULL 
                 AND vid.ProductionDate < ol.ItemMinProductionDate 
            THEN 1 ELSE 0 
        END AS Fail_MinProductionDate,

        CASE 
            WHEN ol.ItemMaxProductionDate IS NOT NULL 
                 AND vid.ProductionDate > ol.ItemMaxProductionDate 
            THEN 1 ELSE 0 
        END AS Fail_MaxProductionDate,

        CASE 
            WHEN ol.ItemMinWeight IS NOT NULL 
                 AND vid.Weight < ol.ItemMinWeight 
            THEN 1 ELSE 0 
        END AS Fail_MinWeight,

        CASE 
            WHEN ol.ItemMaxWeight IS NOT NULL 
                 AND vid.Weight > ol.ItemMaxWeight 
            THEN 1 ELSE 0 
        END AS Fail_MaxWeight,

        CASE
            WHEN ol.ItemMinSellByDate IS NOT NULL
                 AND vid.ShelfLifeDate < ol.ItemMinSellByDate
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS Fail_MinSellByDate,

        CASE
            WHEN vid.ShelfLifeDate < CONVERT(date, GETDATE())
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS Fail_Expired,

        CASE
            WHEN invCommitted.PalletNumber IS NOT NULL
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS Fail_CommittedToAnotherDelivery,

        CASE
            WHEN dtExisting.DirectedTaskId IS NOT NULL
            THEN 1 ELSE 0
        END AS Fail_TaskAlreadyExists

    FROM vwInventoryDetails vid WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)

    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Replenishment Zone only (FIXED STRING_SPLIT)
    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    JOIN WarehouseAreaLocations wal WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
        ON wal.LocationId = vid.WarehouseLocationId
       AND wal.ZoneId IN (
            SELECT CAST(ss.value AS INT)
            FROM WorkstationApplicationSettings was WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
            CROSS APPLY STRING_SPLIT(was.Value, ',') ss
            WHERE was.PackageName = 'Protein.ShopFloor.Dashboard'
              AND was.Code = 'ReplenishmentZones'
       )

    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Delivery / Order context
    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    LEFT JOIN DeliveryLines dl WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
        ON dl.ProductId = vid.ProductId
       AND dl.DeliveryNumber = @DeliveryNumber

    LEFT JOIN OrderLines ol WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
        ON ol.OrderLineNumber = dl.OrderLineNumber
       AND ol.OrderNumber = (
            SELECT OrderNumber
            FROM Deliveries WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
            WHERE DeliveryNumber = @DeliveryNumber
       )

    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Existing commitment
    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    LEFT JOIN vwInventoryDetails invCommitted WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
        ON invCommitted.PalletNumber = vid.PalletNumber
       AND invCommitted.DeliveryNumber IS NOT NULL

    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    -- Existing task
    ------------------------------------------------------------------
    LEFT JOIN DirectedTasks dtExisting WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
        ON dtExisting.PalletNumber = vid.PalletNumber
       AND dtExisting.StatusId <> 7

sql_blocks.label: Block 1
sql_blocks.sql:
SELECT
    PalletNumber,
    CASE
        WHEN MAX(
            Fail_MinProductionDate +
            Fail_MaxProductionDate +
            Fail_MinWeight +
            Fail_MaxWeight +
            Fail_MinSellByDate +
            Fail_Expired +
            Fail_CommittedToAnotherDelivery +
            Fail_TaskAlreadyExists
        ) = 0
        THEN 'QUALIFIES'
        ELSE 'DOES NOT QUALIFY'
    END AS QualificationStatus,

    LTRIM(STUFF(
        CONCAT(
            CASE WHEN MAX(Fail_MinProductionDate) = 1          THEN ', Production date too early'      ELSE '' END,
            CASE WHEN MAX(Fail_MaxProductionDate) = 1          THEN ', Production date too late'       ELSE '' END,
            CASE WHEN MAX(Fail_MinWeight) = 1                  THEN ', Weight below minimum'           ELSE '' END,
            CASE WHEN MAX(Fail_MaxWeight) = 1                  THEN ', Weight above maximum'           ELSE '' END,
            CASE WHEN MAX(Fail_MinSellByDate) = 1              THEN ', Sell-by date too early'         ELSE '' END,
            CASE WHEN MAX(Fail_Expired) = 1                    THEN ', Pallet expired'                 ELSE '' END,
            CASE WHEN MAX(Fail_CommittedToAnotherDelivery) = 1 THEN ', Already committed to delivery' ELSE '' END,
            CASE WHEN MAX(Fail_TaskAlreadyExists) = 1          THEN ', Task already exists'            ELSE '' END
        ),
        1, 1, ''
    )) AS FailureReasons

FROM ReplenPalletDiagnostics WITH (READUNCOMMITTED)
GROUP BY PalletNumber
ORDER BY PalletNumber;
